content: The Indiana University Library Technologies dept. would love it if "Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International (CC BY-NC 4.0)" was added to the License/Data Use Agreement dropdown. Just throwing that out there.
@Renee L. sorry are you saying it's missing from this list? https://guides.dataverse.org/en/6.11/installation/config.html#adding-creative-common-licenses
Somehow I missed this page in my search! Thank you.
No worries! If any license is missing, please open an issue!
